name: @munkel/matrix-gateway
description: Bridges Munkel's WebSocket relay protocol onto a Matrix backend. Run on Node 24. Point the app/CLI at it via MUNKEL_RELAY_URL.

scripts.test: echo '@munkel/matrix-gateway e2e test needs a live Synapse — run: bun run test:e2e (after infra/matrix/scripts/up.sh)' && exit 0
